channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Ex-ESPN star Keith Olbermann blasts Pat McAfee over Canada remarks, calls on network to fire him
item.description: Former ESPN broadcaster Keith Olbermann called on his former employer to fire Pat McAfee over his remarks about Canada. McAfee blasted Canadians for booing the U.S. anthem.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fulham condemns 'vile' racist and homophobic online abuse aimed at defender Bassey
item.description: LONDON (AP) — English soccer club Fulham has condemned the “racist and homophobic abuse” aimed at defender Calvin Bassey on social media following the FA Cup win at Manchester United on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Payton McNabb, HS volleyball player severely injured by trans opponent, to be at Trump's speech to Congress
item.description: Payton McNabb, a former high school volleyball player who was left permanently injured after a spike from a trans athlete, will be in the audience for President Donald Trump's joint speech to Congress.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brewers boost rotation depth by adding veteran lefty Jose Quintana, AP source says
item.description: Veteran left-handed pitcher Jose Quintana is joining the Milwaukee Brewers on a one-year, $4.25 million deal with $1 million in potential bonuses, according to a person familiar with the negotiations. The person spoke on condition of anonymity because the agreement hasn't been announced.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Charles Barkley dismisses notion teams would skip White House visit over Trump
item.description: Charles Barkley pushed back on the notion that any team would skip a White House visit to celebrate a title because of President Donald Trump was "stupid.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rivalry games highlight final week of college basketball's regular season
item.description: The college basketball season has wound down toward the end, with some conference tournaments already starting. The major conferences still have a week left in the regular season and that means rivalry games — and some big ones.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Duke freshman Cooper Flagg stars once more in his possible farewell at Cameron Indoor Stadium
item.description: Duke freshman standout Cooper Flagg delivered one more stellar performance in what may have been his final game at Cameron Indoor Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Beard, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Officials say 'technical issue' prevented video replay of missed knockdown in Davis-Roach fight
item.description: The New York State Athletic Commission said a “technical issue” prevented officials from seeing replay of Gervonta Davis going to a knee in the ninth round of his fight against Lamont Roach.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Cooper Flagg, No. 2 Duke beat Wake Forest 93-60 to claim at least share of ACC regular-season crown
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Freshman Cooper Flagg had 28 points, eight rebounds and seven assists in possibly his final home game, helping No. 2 Duke beat Wake Forest 93-60 on Monday night to clinch at least a share of the Atlantic Coast Conference regular-season title.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Diego FC officials denounce homophobic chant heard at inaugural home match
item.description: "What took place during our first-ever home match does not reflect who we are as a club or the values we stand for," SDFC officials said in a statement Monday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego FC will take steps to stop the homophobic chant that marred its inaugural home match
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — San Diego FC intends to take steps to discourage its fans from engaging in the homophobic chant that marred the Major League Soccer expansion club's inaugural home match last weekend.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eagles releasing 6-time Pro Bowl corner Darius Slay to create cap space: report
item.description: Darius Slay became a cap casualty for the Philadelphia Eagles, as they will reportedly release him as a post-June 1 cut to create $4.3 million in cap space.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rams coach Sean McVay didn't think QB Matthew Stafford would leave during recent contract talks
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Sean McVay says he never seriously thought his partnership with Matthew Stafford would come to an end this month after four seasons together with the Los Angeles Rams.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jimmy Johnson retires from FOX Sports after incredible run as NFL analyst
item.description: Legendary NFL head coach Jimmy Johnson announced on Monday he will retired from broadcasting after more than three decades with FOX Sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL scouting combine helps some, raises questions about others and creates intrigue as draft looms
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — When the NFL scouting combine opened, everyone wanted to see Heisman Trophy winner Travis Hunter work out at two positions and how the top quarterback duel would go. Those hopes were dashed in Indianapolis.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Figure skating titans come together for emotional event benefiting victims of DC plane crash
item.description: The Legacy on Ice benefit event, featuring U.S. figure skating stars, payed tribute to the 67 people who died in the Washington, D.C., plane crash on Jan. 29.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: USF football’s 2025 schedule revealed
item.description: TAMPA (USF) - The Bulls learned the course they will chart in the 2025 South Florida Football Season presented by Tampa General Hospital, its third under Head Coach Alex Golesh, on Friday when the American Athletic Conference released the 2025 schedules for member schools.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: BYU wins sixth straight, cruising past West Virginia
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Fousseyni Traore recorded the 21st double-double of his career on Saturday evening as No. 25 BYU defeated West Virginia 77-56 in front of a sold-out Marriott Center. “It was an ultimate tale of two halves," head coach Kevin Young said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Runnin' Utes trounce Arizona State, 99-73
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Ezra Ausar scored 25 points and Utah put up 58 points in the second half to pull away from Arizona State to earn its first win under interim coach Josh Eilert, 99-73 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: No. 4 Houston clinches Big 12 regular-season title with 73-64 win over Cincinnati
item.description: L.J. Cryer scored 20 points and No. 4 Houston clinched the outright Big 12 regular-season title for a second straight season with a 73-64 win over Cincinnati on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lee Kunzman, 'persistent' Indy 500 veteran, dies at 80
item.description: Kunzman's best finish in his INDYCAR SERIES career was in 1979, when he placed second at Atlanta Motor Speedway. It was just a narrow loss to winner Johnny Rutherford, IMS officials said.
item.dc:creator: Cooper Hudson, WGN 9

item.title: John Collins leads Jazz to 117-116 win over Minnesota
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Walker Kessler had a go-ahead dunk with 9.7 seconds left to help the Utah Jazz beat the Minnesota Timberwolves 117-116 on Friday night, snapping a six-game losing streak in the series.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: CMU Baseball explodes at the plate for dominant double-header sweep
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — On an absolutely picturesque day for baseball at The Diamond at the Bus Bergman Sports Complex, CMU trailed MSU Billings 2-0 early. A 2-run shot to right by MSU's River Smith in the top of the 2nd put the Mavs in a hole.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Davis beats Herriman to win 6A state title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In a battle of the top two 6A boys basketball teams, Davis proved to be the best in the state. Coleman Atwater poured in 24 points, while Bode Sparrow added 16 as the #2 seeded Darts knocked off top-seeded Herriman, 75-66.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: San Diego FC home opener: what to know before you go
item.description: San Diego FC (SDFC) is expected to make history this Saturday, March 1, as the club hosts its inaugural home opener at Snapdragon Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: RSL eliminated from Champions Cub with 2-1 loss
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake failed to advance to the Round of 16 of the 2025 CONCACAF Champions Cup with a 2-1 home loss against CS Herediano on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes lose to Arizona in Josh Eilert's debut, 83-66
item.description: TUCSON, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - It was nearly an impossible task for the Runnin' Utes Wednesday night in their first game under interim head coach Josh Eilert. In his first game since Craig Smith was fired, Eilert's Utes got blown out by #22 Arizona, 83-66.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Super Bowl sports reporter found dead in hotel had sedative in his system: authorities
item.description: The woman accused of taking the reporter's phone and bank cards has previously been accused of drugging men to steal from them, according to investigators.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Hamilton, Fox 5

item.title: Blackhawks fall in Utah, drop 4th straight as rough February nears end
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — There are at least two good things about the month of February for the Blackhawks: That it's almost over and that they didn't play for half of it. Because when they've been on the ice, it hasn't been a good month.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: San Diego Wave FC to host 2025 jersey launch event at Belmont Park
item.description: San Diego Wave FC is gearing up for the launch of the team's 2025 jersey kit, with a special event slated for Thursday at Beach House, located at Belmont Park in Mission Beach.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Wrestling at Frontwave Arena: a preview with Thunder Rosa
item.description: All Elite Wrestling (AEW) is set to bring an action-packed night to Oceanside's Frontwave Arena on Wednesday, with stars like Thunder Rosa, a trailblazer in women's wrestling, ready to take center stage.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Utah wins another tight 2-1 game over Chicago
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is learning how to finish games just in time for a playoff push. Lawson Crouse scored the game-winning goal with 7:48 left in regulation, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Chicago Blackhawks 2-1 at Delta Center on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: GJ River Hawks 19U girls team set for first-ever playoffs at River City Sportplex
item.description: River City Sportplex is currently in the midst of the first-ever GJ River Hawks’ 19U Girls hockey season. Now, it's playoff time.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5
